name: search_flights
description: Search for available flights between two airports on a given date. Returns a list of flight options with airline, departure time, arrival time, and a flight_id.

origin.description: IATA airport code for the departure airport (e.g. 'JFK', 'LAX')

destination.description: IATA airport code for the arrival airport

function.name: search_flights
function.description: Search for available flights between two airports on a given date. Returns a list of flight options with airline, departure time, arrival time, and a flight_id.

origin.description: IATA airport code for the departure airport (e.g. 'JFK', 'LAX')

destination.description: IATA airport code for the arrival airport

name: get_flight_details
description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific flight including price, seat availability, and baggage policy.

flight_id.description: Unique flight identifier returned by search_flights

function.name: get_flight_details
function.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific flight including price, seat availability, and baggage policy.

flight_id.description: Unique flight identifier returned by search_flights

name: book_flight
description: Book a flight for one or more passengers. Returns a booking confirmation number and PNR.

flight_id.description: Flight identifier from search_flights or get_flight_details

passenger_name.description: Full legal name of the primary passenger

function.name: book_flight
function.description: Book a flight for one or more passengers. Returns a booking confirmation number and PNR.

flight_id.description: Flight identifier from search_flights or get_flight_details

passenger_name.description: Full legal name of the primary passenger

name: search_hotels
description: Search for available hotels in a city for given check-in and check-out dates. Returns a list of hotels with hotel_id, name, star rating, and nightly rate.

city.description: City name to search hotels in

max_price_per_night.description: Maximum price per night in USD

function.name: search_hotels
function.description: Search for available hotels in a city for given check-in and check-out dates. Returns a list of hotels with hotel_id, name, star rating, and nightly rate.

city.description: City name to search hotels in

max_price_per_night.description: Maximum price per night in USD

name: book_hotel
description: Book a hotel room and return a reservation confirmation with reservation_id.

guest_name.description: Full name of the primary guest

function.name: book_hotel
function.description: Book a hotel room and return a reservation confirmation with reservation_id.

guest_name.description: Full name of the primary guest

name: get_current_weather
description: Get the current weather conditions for a city including temperature, humidity, wind speed, and a weather description.

function.name: get_current_weather
function.description: Get the current weather conditions for a city including temperature, humidity, wind speed, and a weather description.

name: get_weather_forecast
description: Retrieve a multi-day weather forecast for a location. Returns daily high/low temperatures, precipitation probability, and conditions.

city.description: City name to get forecast for

function.name: get_weather_forecast
function.description: Retrieve a multi-day weather forecast for a location. Returns daily high/low temperatures, precipitation probability, and conditions.

city.description: City name to get forecast for

name: get_weather_alerts
description: Check for active severe weather alerts and warnings for a given region.

city.description: City or region to check for weather alerts

function.name: get_weather_alerts
function.description: Check for active severe weather alerts and warnings for a given region.

city.description: City or region to check for weather alerts

name: search_products
description: Search for products in an ecommerce catalogue by keyword, category, or price range. Returns a list of products with product_id, name, price, and rating.

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return (default 10)

function.name: search_products
function.description: Search for products in an ecommerce catalogue by keyword, category, or price range. Returns a list of products with product_id, name, price, and rating.

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return (default 10)

name: get_product_details
description: Retrieve full product information including description, specifications, images, and current stock level.

product_id.description: Unique product identifier returned by search_products

function.name: get_product_details
function.description: Retrieve full product information including description, specifications, images, and current stock level.

product_id.description: Unique product identifier returned by search_products

name: add_to_cart
description: Add a product to the user's shopping cart. Returns updated cart with cart_id and total.

product_id.description: Product identifier to add to cart

cart_id.description: Existing cart ID to add to (creates new cart if omitted)

function.name: add_to_cart
function.description: Add a product to the user's shopping cart. Returns updated cart with cart_id and total.

product_id.description: Product identifier to add to cart

cart_id.description: Existing cart ID to add to (creates new cart if omitted)

name: place_order
description: Place an order for the items in a cart. Returns an order_id and estimated delivery date.

cart_id.description: Shopping cart identifier to check out

shipping_address.description: Full shipping address including street, city, state, and zip code

function.name: place_order
function.description: Place an order for the items in a cart. Returns an order_id and estimated delivery date.

cart_id.description: Shopping cart identifier to check out

shipping_address.description: Full shipping address including street, city, state, and zip code

name: get_order_status
description: Track the status and shipping progress of an existing order.

function.description: Track the status and shipping progress of an existing order.

description: Fetch customer reviews and ratings for a product, with optional filtering by star rating.

product_id.description: Product identifier to get reviews for

description: Get the current exchange rate between two currencies.

name: get_airport_info
description: Look up airport details including name, terminals, lounges, and ground transport options by IATA code.

name: check_visa_requirements
description: Check the visa and entry requirements for a traveller from one country visiting another.

passport_country.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code of the traveller's passport (e.g. 'US', 'GB')

destination_country.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code of the destination

function.description: Check the visa and entry requirements for a traveller from one country visiting another.

name: apply_discount_code
description: Validate and apply a promotional discount code to a shopping cart. Returns updated cart total and discount amount.

discount_code.description: Promotional or coupon code to apply

function.description: Validate and apply a promotional discount code to a shopping cart. Returns updated cart total and discount amount.

description: Get estimated shipping costs and delivery times for a cart to a given address.

name: get_flight_status
description: Check real-time status of a flight — whether it is on time, delayed, or cancelled — using the flight number.

date.description: Date of the flight in YYYY-MM-DD format
